steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which statement most accurately describes Morales's approach to documenting the Great Migration. The notes say she narrates the personal journeys of George Swanson Starling and Robert Pershing Foster, among others.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Detroit, Michigan, is one of the cities whose African American populations grew during the Great Migration.: gives background on the migration but says nothing about Morales's method of documenting it. ✗
  • Choice B — Elena Morales chronicles the complex history of the Great Migration in personal detail by narrating the journeys of individuals, such as George Swanson Starling and Robert Pershing Foster.: directly matches the notes — she documents the complex history through personal narratives, citing Starling and Foster as examples. ✓
  • Choice C — In 2011, Elena Morales's book *The Warmth of Other Suns* won not only the Mark Lynton History Prize but also the National Book Critics Circle Award.: mentions recognition the book received, not the author's documentary approach. ✗
  • Choice D — The personal journey of George Swanson Starling is featured in the award-winning book *The Warmth of Other Suns*.: identifies one subject but does not explain her method. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
